arts.ttl: Alonso delivers Mbappe fitness update ahead of Al-Hilal clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Xabi Alonso delivers an update on Kylian Mbappe's fitness ahead of Wednesday's Club World Cup meeting with Al-Hilal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Al Hilal: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: All eyes will be on Xabi Alonso and Simone Inzaghi when Real Madrid and Al Hilal face off in the FIFA Club World Cup. Both Real Madrid and Al Hilal are looking to bounce back from their disappointing 2024–25 campaigns in the United States this summer.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe is ‘serious doubt’ for Real Madrid Club World Cup debut against Al-Hilal
arts.sum: Real Madrid will make their bow in the Club World Cup on Wednesday night at 21:00 CEST, in a match full of unknowns for Los Blancos. The latest is star striker Kylian Mbappe, who is a late doubt for the game. The French superstar missed Real Madrid’s final training session ahead of their game against […] The post Kylian Mbappe is ‘serious doubt’ for Real Madrid Club World Cup debut against Al-Hilal appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Al Hilal: Xabi Alonso Awards Two Debuts
arts.sum: While the Argentine teenager will represent River Plate at the FIFA Club World Cup, Alexander-Arnold and Huijsen are set to make their debuts for Real Madrid in the newly expanded tournament. The biggest club in the world had a busy summer after finishing the 2024–25 season without a major trophy ; Los Blancos replaced Carlo Ancelotti with Alonso and then signed Trent Alexander-Arnold, Dean Huijsen and Franco Mastantuono.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Huijsen & Alexander-Arnold calls ahead of Al-Hilal clash
arts.sum: The coaching staff at La Liga giants Real Madrid are ready to afford starting berths to both of the club’s new defensive signings on Wednesday. That’s according to Marca, who…

arts.ttl: ’I Wouldn’t Be Surprised’-Al Hilal CEO Makes Bold Vinicius Junior Transfer Prediction
arts.sum: Al Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada believes that the Saudi Pro League is capable of attracting any player, including Real Madrid superstar Vinícius Júnior, but has denied holding direct talks with the Brazilian. Despite this, Calzada, who previously worked in a management role for the City Football Group, believes that one day, Vinícius could wind up in the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal CEO confirms Saudi Arabia talks with Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior
arts.sum: Al-Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada has confirmed that Saudi Arabia have held talks with Vinicius Junior over a move to the Middle East. The Real Madrid superstar is widely expected to sign a contract extension with Los Blancos this summer. arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Al-Hilal: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for Club World Cup
arts.sum: England international is set to benefit from a defensive injury crisis

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Al-Hilal: Predicted Lineup for Club World Cup Match
arts.sum: Defenders Dani Carvajal and Eder Militao are available, but are they ready to start after missing 6-8 months of the 2024-25 season? The Spaniard has new signings Dean Huijsen and Trent Alexander-Arnold to choose from, as well as players returning from long-term injuries.

Real Madrid play their first game under Xabi Alonso and will hope to make an immediate impact under the watchful eye of the Spaniard. Similarly, this will be Al-Hilal's first game with Simone Inzaghi...
